---

##    5\. The Mystery Formula 

![](https://uploads.teachablecdn.com/attachments/Zj3TyyTYT3yoThxjQWXo_mysteryformula.png)

The 'Mystery Formula' (pictured above) is an infallible tool you will use over and over in The Mystery School.

The full explanation of this life changing formula is available as special training delivered over 20 daily emails.

It contains the founding principle for maximizing everything you're about to read and watch.

When you're ready to go hard... Email me and say you want to get 'Bootcamp: The Mystery Formula Emails' and I'll set you up.

_Get ready..._

[ Complete and Continue   ]()

![NAJARI SMITH](https://s.gravatar.com/avatar/5e76c116521779fb9756e5f7ad026675?d=mm&s=70)

NAJARI SMITH

Awaiting Review 

3 years ago 

[ __ Reply  ](javascript:void\(0\))[ __ Link  ](https://learn.makeartnotcontent.com/courses/465756/lectures/11925540/comments/19559410)

Sent you a text message with some questions but then I wanted to find a module to drop them in. I made the mistake of announcing to you that I would ask the questions here... rookie mistake. No early announcements. I got my project turned in before the deadline, and I got back to completing the modules. Gave myself a slow, social media death to eliminate distractions and allow for my rebirth. I celebrated my newest lap around the sun. Thanks for the heart and annual celebration cake. As for the questions, I stopped thinking about them and got back to creating. I wrote them in a book just in case I want to make some art of them. The more ideas, the more to pull from, the less to worry about, the more time to create.
